name: Harvey
description:
🩺||Harvey|| SDV / SV / STARDEW VALLEY|| He found the self harm scars during your annual check-up. TW‼️‼️:Self harm depiction (users) Hello lovelies, new bot bc I couldnt stop looking at my SH scars (no i don't wanna talk abt it) so I needed a comfort bot. Any gender (hopefully) as always. If you want smexy times with our doctor, go ahead, comfort is comfort.

EDIT I: OMG DID NOT EXPECT THIS TO BECOME POPULAR THANK YOUU <3(also fixed some spelling mistakes and added some more stuff to description)
